### Check 2: State machine & audit log

### Check 3: Financial / concurrency

```
━━ Financial math, concurrency, and soft-delete check (rules #3, #19, #20, #21) ━━

  Scanned 1630 files.

  ✅ Rule #3 — no where(isDeleted, !=, true) queries — clean
  ✅ Rule #19 — read+write needs runTransaction — clean
  ✅ Rule #20 — batch ops in loops need 500-op chunking — clean
  ✅ Rule #21 — no fallback chains on amount fields — clean

✅ Financial / concurrency check passed.
```

### Check 4: Structural consistency

```
━━ Structural consistency check (rules #4, #24, #28) ━━

  ✅ Rule #4 — collections referenced in code need firestore.rules entries — clean
  ✅ Rule #24 — TransactionType switches must be exhaustive (no `default:`) — clean
  ✅ Rule #28 — modules need List + New + View + Edit pages — clean
  ✅ Rule #30 — useParams() under [id] routes (broken under static export) — clean

✅ Structural check passed.
```
